title: Clovercraft Ultimate
description: A full suite of tools for use on the Clovercraft SMP
body:
The Clovercraft Ultimate Modpack includes everything from the Quality-of-Life modpack, along with extra tools for players who need that additional bit of power in their client. Including features for schematics, free cam, and a massive collection of advanced game information, this modpack covers everything you need.

**Included Mods**
Please note this is not an exhaustive list, and only includes feature mods not library and support mods.

* 3D Skin Layers - Does what it says!
* Better Statistics Screen - View your stats in a searchable full screen menu
* BetterF3 - Gives you a better F3 screen
* Chat Heads - Adds player heads next to chat messages
* Continuity - Support for better connected textures
* Dynamic Light - a dynamic and handheld light mod
* EntityCulling - reduce the number of animated entities for performance
* Freecam - Allows free movement of the camera without moving the player
* Inventory Profiles Next - A huge set of extra inventory tools
* Iris - Shader support
* Litematica - Create, manage, and place schematics
* Lithium - Rendering engine optimizations
* Locator Heads - Replaces locator bar dots with player heads
* MiniHUD - Massive selection of world information tools
* Mod Menu - Adds a mod menu
* Not Enough Animations - Better 3rd person animations
* Reese's Sodium Options - Option menu changes for Sodium graphics settings
* Shulkerbox Tooltips - See what's in your shulkers
* Simple Voice Chat - Prox chat
* Sodium - Graphics engine optimizations
* Sodium Extras - extra graphics features
* Voxy - A far distance rendering mod utilising LoDs
* [Xaero's Minimap](https://chocolateminecraft.com/minimap2.php) - A highly configurable mini-map with entity radar
* [Xaero's World Map](https://chocolateminecraft.com/worldmap.php) - A worldmap that pairs wonderfully with the mini-map
* Zoomify - Adds zoom functionality to the player camera
